offer: For accountants managing 5–15 clients/month using QuickBooks, time-consuming manual financial statement generation causes late client reports. We automate financial statement generation instead of manual preparation of financial statements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where accountants seek help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based financial statement generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
